requirement_topic.en: Armenian / EAEU Market Access — EAC Mark, Certification / Declaration and In-Country Importer
requirement_topic.zh: 亚美尼亚/EAEU市场准入——EAC标志、认证/声明及在地进口商
requirement_topic.zht: 亞美尼亞/EAEU市場准入——EAC標誌、認證/聲明及在地進口商

summary.en: Non-EAEU manufacturers placing portable lithium batteries or power banks on the Armenian market must fulfil the following market access obligations: (1) EAC conformity mark — affixed after completing the applicable conformity-assessment procedure (certification or declaration of conformity) under TR CU 004/2011, TR CU 020/2011, and TR EAEU 037/2016 through an accredited EAEU conformity-assessment body. (2) In-country importer / applicant — a person established within the EAEU (commonly the Armenian or other EAEU importer) must act as the applicant holding the certificate or declaration and bear responsibility for the product on the market; a foreign manufacturer cannot self-declare without an EAEU-resident applicant. (3) Accompanying documentation and marking — operational and safety documentation is commonly required in Russian, with marking in line with the EAC requirements. Armenia, being landlocked, is reached by rail and road, so consignment routing through the EAEU customs territory and the importer of record is integral to market entry.
summary.zh: 非EAEU制造商将便携式锂电池或移动电源投放亚美尼亚市场，须履行以下市场准入义务：（1）EAC合格标志——在通过EAEU认可的合格评定机构、依据TR CU 004/2011、TR CU 020/2011及TR EAEU 037/2016完成适用合格评定程序（认证或合格声明）后粘贴。（2）在地进口商/申请人——须有一名在EAEU境内设立的主体（通常为亚美尼亚或其他EAEU进口商）作为持有证书或声明的申请人，并对市场上的产品承担责任；外国制造商在无EAEU境内申请人的情况下不能自行声明。（3）随附文件及标识——操作和安全文件通常须以俄文提供，标识须符合EAC要求。亚美尼亚为内陆国，经铁路和公路抵达，因此经EAEU关税领土的货物路线安排及记录在案的进口商是进入市场的组成部分。
summary.zht: 非EAEU製造商將便攜式鋰電池或行動電源投放亞美尼亞市場，須履行以下市場准入義務：（1）EAC合格標誌——在通過EAEU認可的合格評定機構、依據TR CU 004/2011、TR CU 020/2011及TR EAEU 037/2016完成適用合格評定程序（認證或合格聲明）後粘貼。（2）在地進口商/申請人——須有一名在EAEU境內設立的主體（通常為亞美尼亞或其他EAEU進口商）作為持有證書或聲明的申請人，並對市場上的產品承擔責任；外國製造商在無EAEU境內申請人的情況下不能自行聲明。（3）隨附文件及標識——操作和安全文件通常須以俄文提供，標識須符合EAC要求。亞美尼亞為內陸國，經鐵路和公路抵達，因此經EAEU關稅領土的貨物路線安排及記錄在案的進口商是進入市場的組成部分。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 004/2011 — On the safety of low-voltage equipment (EAC marking framework)
TR CU 020/2011 — Electromagnetic compatibility of technical equipment (EAC marking framework)
TR EAEU 037/2016 — On restriction of the use of hazardous substances in electrical and electronic products
EAEU conformity-assessment rules — certification and declaration procedures and the single EAC （ЕАС） conformity mark

summary.en: China's domestic market access for lithium battery products uses a different framework: CCC (China Compulsory Certification, administered by CNCA / SAMR) is mandatory for certain rechargeable battery product categories sold domestically (e.g., mobile phone lithium batteries are CCC-listed). However, CCC certification is a Chinese domestic market requirement and is NOT recognised by the EAEU; it does not substitute for the EAC mark. Chinese manufacturers do not need to appoint an EAEU-resident importer / applicant for domestic Chinese sales, and there is no Chinese equivalent of the EAEU single-mark certification / declaration procedure or the in-country applicant obligation for exporters.
summary.zh: 中国国内锂电池产品市场准入采用不同框架：CCC（中国强制认证，由CNCA/SAMR管理）对某些在国内销售的可充电电池产品类别为强制性（如手机锂电池已列入CCC目录）。然而，CCC认证属于中国国内市场要求，不被EAEU认可，不可替代EAC标志。中国制造商在国内销售时无需任命EAEU境内进口商/申请人，对于出口商，中国也没有等同于EAEU单一标志认证/声明程序或在地申请人义务的对应制度。
summary.zht: 中國國內鋰電池產品市場准入採用不同框架：CCC（中國強制認證，由CNCA/SAMR管理）對某些在國內銷售的可充電電池產品類別為強制性（如手機鋰電池已列入CCC目錄）。然而，CCC認證屬於中國國內市場要求，不被EAEU認可，不可替代EAC標誌。中國製造商在國內銷售時無需任命EAEU境內進口商/申請人，對於出口商，中國也沒有等同於EAEU單一標誌認證/聲明程序或在地申請人義務的對應制度。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA/SAMR) — domestic China market access only; not recognised in EAEU
GB 31241-2022 — domestic safety certification basis for portable lithium batteries

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers exporting portable batteries to Armenia face structural market access gaps with no Chinese domestic equivalent: (1) the EAC conformity mark obtained through EAEU certification or declaration — CCC is not transferable; (2) an EAEU-resident importer / applicant must hold the certificate or declaration and carry product responsibility before market placement; (3) accompanying documentation and marking obligations, commonly in Russian; (4) the conformity file must cover TR CU 004/2011, TR CU 020/2011, and TR EAEU 037/2016 together. As Armenia is landlocked, exporters must also plan rail / road routing through the EAEU customs territory. Total compliance cost may include accredited-body assessment fees, the EAEU importer / applicant arrangement, and translation / marking costs.
gap.zh: 向亚美尼亚出口便携式电池的中国制造商面临在中国国内无对应制度的结构性市场准入差距：（1）通过EAEU认证或声明取得的EAC合格标志——CCC不可转移；（2）投放市场前须有一名EAEU境内进口商/申请人持有证书或声明并承担产品责任；（3）随附文件及标识义务，通常须以俄文提供；（4）合格评定文件须一并涵盖TR CU 004/2011、TR CU 020/2011及TR EAEU 037/2016。由于亚美尼亚为内陆国，出口商还须规划经EAEU关税领土的铁路/公路路线。合规总成本可能包括认可机构评审费、EAEU进口商/申请人安排及翻译/标识费用。
gap.zht: 向亞美尼亞出口便攜式電池的中國製造商面臨在中國國內無對應制度的結構性市場准入差距：（1）通過EAEU認證或聲明取得的EAC合格標誌——CCC不可轉移；（2）投放市場前須有一名EAEU境內進口商/申請人持有證書或聲明並承擔產品責任；（3）隨附文件及標識義務，通常須以俄文提供；（4）合格評定文件須一併涵蓋TR CU 004/2011、TR CU 020/2011及TR EAEU 037/2016。由於亞美尼亞為內陸國，出口商還須規劃經EAEU關稅領土的鐵路/公路路線。合規總成本可能包括認可機構評審費、EAEU進口商/申請人安排及翻譯/標識費用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation — the EAC conformity mark under the applicable EAEU technical regulations and an EAEU-resident importer / applicant are required before Armenian / EAEU market placement; accompanying documentation is commonly required in Russian
mandatory_status.cn: CCC certification mandatory for domestically-sold products in applicable categories; no equivalent of the EAC mark, EAEU certification / declaration procedure, or in-country importer / applicant required of Chinese exporters under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese portable battery and power bank exporters must address EAEU market access obligations before Armenian market entry: the EAC conformity mark via certification or declaration under TR CU 004/2011, TR CU 020/2011, and TR EAEU 037/2016, and an EAEU-resident importer / applicant holding the certificate or declaration. CCC certification does not transfer to or substitute for any of these EAEU requirements, and consignments must be routed by rail / road through the EAEU customs territory.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国便携式电池及移动电源出口商在进入亚美尼亚市场前，须应对EAEU市场准入义务：依据TR CU 004/2011、TR CU 020/2011及TR EAEU 037/2016通过认证或声明取得EAC合格标志，并由一名EAEU境内进口商/申请人持有证书或声明。CCC认证无法转移或替代上述任何EAEU要求，且货物须经EAEU关税领土以铁路/公路运输。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國便攜式電池及行動電源出口商在進入亞美尼亞市場前，須應對EAEU市場准入義務：依據TR CU 004/2011、TR CU 020/2011及TR EAEU 037/2016通過認證或聲明取得EAC合格標誌，並由一名EAEU境內進口商/申請人持有證書或聲明。CCC認證無法轉移或替代上述任何EAEU要求，且貨物須經EAEU關稅領土以鐵路/公路運輸。

source.publisher: Eurasian Economic Commission (EEC) — Conformity assessment and the EAC mark
